zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Thomas de Dutton於1214年出生在英國英格蘭爾達頓時，他的父親Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton88歲，母親Lady Alice Prescott82歲。他與Philippa Standon在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年在英國爾達頓享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾達頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Thomas de Dutton于1214年出生在英国英格兰爾達頓时，他的父亲Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton88岁，母亲Lady Alice Prescott82岁。他与Philippa Standon在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年在英国爾達頓享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾達頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Thomas de Dutton was born in 1214, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, was 88 and his mother, Lady Alice Prescott, was 82. He married Philippa Standon in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1272, in Dutton, Cheshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Thomas de Dutton est né en 1214, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, avait 88 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Prescott, avait 82 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Standon à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1272, à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Dutton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Thomas de Dutton 1214 in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton 88 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Prescott 82. Er hat in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Philippa Standon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1272 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Dutton, Cheshire, England und wurde in Dutton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas de Dutton è nato il nel 1214 nel Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, aveva 88 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Prescott, aveva 82 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Standon nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1272, nel Dutton, Cheshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Dutton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas de Duttonが1214年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Duttonは88歳，母Lady Alice Prescottは82歳であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでPhilippa Standonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年にイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Thomas de Dutton(이)가 1214년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton(은)는 88세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Prescott(은)는 82세였다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Philippa Standon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 영국 체실르 드턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 드턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Thomas de Dutton nasceu em 1214, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, tinha 88 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Prescott, tinha 82 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Standon em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1272, em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Thomas de Dutton родился в 1214 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton было 88 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Prescott, 82. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Standon в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1272 г. в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности дуттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Thomas de Dutton nació en 1214, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Hugh Dutton 3rd Lord of Dutton, tenía 88 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Prescott, tenía 82 años. Se casó con Philippa Standon en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1272, en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Dutton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
